fuel_dock_info.description: Full-service fuel dock offering gasoline and diesel with convenient access for transient and seasonal boaters. Pump-out, ice, and basic provisions are available during posted operating hours.
fuel_dock_info.approach_instructions: Hail "Harborview Marina Fuel" on VHF Channel 9 when you are 10 minutes out. Approach at idle speed along the main fairway and follow staff directions. The fuel dock is located just inside the breakwater on the starboard side.
fuel_dock_info.safety_guidelines: No smoking or open flames at the fuel dock. Shut off all engines, generators, and electrical equipment before fueling. All persons must remain on board or on the dock, not in the water. Report any spills immediately to dock staff and use absorbent pads as directed.

service_packages.name: 100-Hour Engine Service
service_packages.description: Manufacturer-recommended 100-hour service for gasoline or diesel inboard and sterndrive engines. Includes oil and filter change, fuel filters, inspection of belts and hoses, and sea trial check.

service_packages.name: Basic Engine Oil & Filter Change
service_packages.description: Oil and filter change service for single-engine boats up to 8 quarts capacity.

service_packages.name: Haul-Out & Pressure Wash
service_packages.description: Haul-out on travel lift, bottom pressure wash, and short-term blocking in yard.

service_packages.name: Bottom Paint Package
service_packages.description: Includes light sanding, tape, and application of two coats of ablative bottom paint (paint cost additional per foot).

service_packages.name: Topside Wash & Wax
service_packages.description: Full topside wash and machine wax to restore gloss and protect gelcoat.

service_packages.name: Battery & Charging System Check
service_packages.description: Diagnostic check of batteries, charger, and alternator output with load testing.

service_packages.name: Spring Commissioning Package
service_packages.description: Prepare your boat for the season with systems check, zinc inspection, and sea trial.

add_on_services.name: Bottom Paint Add-On
add_on_services.description: Add full bottom paint service to your haul-out, including light sanding, taping, and two coats of ablative paint (materials billed per foot). Recommended for boats over 30 ft.

add_on_services.name: Prop & Shaft Zinc Replacement
add_on_services.description: Inspect and replace propeller, shaft, and trim tab zincs while the boat is out of the water.

add_on_services.name: Engine Diagnostic Scan
add_on_services.description: Computer diagnostic scan of compatible engines, including fault code readout and recommendations.

add_on_services.name: Interior Cleaning Add-On
add_on_services.description: Vacuum carpets, wipe hard surfaces, clean heads and galley, and empty trash.

add_on_services.name: Basic Electrical Systems Inspection
add_on_services.description: Visual inspection of panels, wiring runs, and navigation lights, with written findings.

service_appointments.notes: Customer requested engine diagnostic printout after service.
